---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: featured-posts
    contents: blog/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [title, subtitle, author, date, image]
---

::::::: column-body-outset
::: section-heading
## Welcome!
:::

Statistics has a reputation for being intimidating. It doesn't have to be.

The content on this site is written for anyone who works with data and wants to go beyond the mechanics — to understand not just *how* the methods work, but *why* they work, and *when* to trust them. Every post aims to build genuine intuition from first principles, with mathematics that illuminates rather than obscures.

<a role="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="about/index.html">Learn more</a>

::: section-heading
## Featured Posts
:::

::: {#featured-posts}
:::

<a role="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="blog/">See more</a>

::: newsletter-section
<!-- ## Stay in the Loop -->

<!-- New posts straight to your inbox. No paywalls, ever. -->

<!-- <iframe scrolling="no" style="width:100%!important;height:220px;border:1px #ccc solid !important" src="https://buttondown.email/YOURNAME?as_embed=true"> -->

<!-- </iframe> -->
:::
:::::::
